dependencies.relationship: Server Core helpers (APIGroup, APIError, NowUTC, FormatUTC, SetETag, CheckETag, CacheMiddleware) used in all handlers and tests
Database layer (*sql.DB, db.WrapError, db.ErrNotFound, db.FormatTime, db.ParseTime) used in all org and membership queries
Auth middleware (GetAuthInfo, GetUserID, IsAdmin, RequireAdmin) used in every handler for access control

task_groups.title: Implement Types, Slug Validator, isOrgMember Helper, and RegisterOrgHandlers

subtasks.title: Define request/response types and OrgResponse/OrgMemberResponse structs
details: In internal/handlers/orgs.go, define CreateOrgRequest, UpdateOrgRequest, OrgResponse, OrgMemberResponse structs with the JSON tags exactly as specified in the PRD interfaces section.
OrgResponse fields: ID, Name, Slug, URL, Status, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt (all string, JSON keys snake_case).
OrgMemberResponse fields: UserID, Username, Email, Role, JoinedAt (all string, JSON keys snake_case).
UpdateOrgRequest fields: Name *string, URL *string with omitempty.

subtasks.title: Implement validateSlug function
details: Implement func validateSlug(slug string) error in internal/handlers/orgs.go.
Use regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]{0,126}[a-z0-9]$|^[a-z0-9]$`) or equivalent logic.
Check: non-empty, max 128 chars, only [a-z0-9_-], no leading/trailing hyphen or underscore.
Return fmt.Errorf('invalid slug format') on any violation.
Export for testing if needed or keep unexported and test via handler.

subtasks.title: Implement isOrgMember helper and RegisterOrgHandlers
details: Implement func isOrgMember(db *sql.DB, orgID, userID string) (bool, error) in internal/handlers/org_members.go.
Query: SELECT 1 FROM org_members WHERE org_id=? AND user_id=? LIMIT 1; use sql.ErrNoRows to return (false, nil).
Implement func RegisterOrgHandlers(g *echo.Group, database *sql.DB) in internal/handlers/orgs.go.
Panic with descriptive message if database is nil (08-REQ-1.E1).
Register all 10 routes using the exact function names from the PRD interfaces section.

go vet ./internal/handlers/... reports no errors
08-REQ-1.1, 08-REQ-1.2, 08-REQ-12, 08-REQ-13 acceptance criteria met

subtasks.title: Implement createOrg handler
details: func createOrg(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c), bind CreateOrgRequest, trim name, validate slug via validateSlug.
Generate uuid.New().String() for org ID; call NowUTC() for timestamps; set status='active'.
Execute INSERT INTO orgs (id, name, slug, url, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?).
On INSERT error: call db.WrapError; check for UNIQUE constraint violation on name vs slug column; return APIError 409 with correct message or 500.
On success: return c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, OrgResponse{...}) with all fields populated.

subtasks.title: Implement listOrgs handler
details: func listOrgs(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c).
Read include_blocked := c.QueryParam('include_blocked') == 'true'.
If not include_blocked: SELECT ... FROM orgs WHERE status='active' ORDER BY name ASC.
If include_blocked: SELECT ... FROM orgs ORDER BY name ASC.
Scan rows into []OrgResponse; initialize as empty slice (not nil) to ensure [] JSON output.
On DB error: call db.WrapError, return APIError 500.
Return c.JSON(http.StatusOK, orgs).

checks: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestCreateOrg|TestListOrgs' — all tests pass
go vet ./internal/handlers/... reports no errors
08-REQ-2 and 08-REQ-3 acceptance criteria met including all edge cases

subtasks.title: Implement getOrg handler
details: func getOrg(c echo.Context) error: parse and validate :id via uuid.Parse; return APIError 400 'invalid organization id' on failure.
SELECT org from orgs WHERE id=?; on db.ErrNotFound return APIError 404 'organization not found'.
Call IsAdmin(c); if false, call isOrgMember(db, orgID, GetUserID(c)); propagate db error as 500; return 403 'forbidden' if not member.
Call SetETag(c, org.UpdatedAt) then CheckETag(c); if ETag matches return c.NoContent(http.StatusNotModified).
Return c.JSON(http.StatusOK, orgResponse).

subtasks.title: Implement updateOrg handler
details: func updateOrg(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c); parse :id UUID; bind UpdateOrgRequest.
If both Name and URL are nil, return APIError 400 'no fields to update'.
If Name is non-nil, trim whitespace; if empty after trim return APIError 400 'name is required'.
SELECT org WHERE id=?; on not found return 404.
Build UPDATE orgs SET ... updated_at=? WHERE id=? with NowUTC(); slug is never in SET clause.
On UNIQUE violation on name: return APIError 409 'organization name already exists'. On other DB error: 500.
Re-fetch updated org and return c.JSON(http.StatusOK, orgResponse).

checks: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestGetOrg|TestUpdateOrg' — all tests pass
go vet ./internal/handlers/... reports no errors
08-REQ-4 and 08-REQ-5 acceptance criteria and edge cases met; slug immutability verified in TestUpdateOrg_SlugIgnored

task_groups.title: Implement deleteOrg, blockOrg, and unblockOrg Handlers

subtasks.title: Implement deleteOrg handler
details: func deleteOrg(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c); parse :id UUID; return 400 on invalid.
Execute DELETE FROM orgs WHERE id=?; check rows affected via result.RowsAffected().
If 0 rows deleted: return APIError 404 'organization not found'.
ON DELETE CASCADE in DB handles org_members; user rows unaffected.
On DB error: call db.WrapError, return APIError 500.
Return c.NoContent(http.StatusNoContent).

subtasks.title: Implement blockOrg handler
details: func blockOrg(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c); parse :id UUID; return 400 on invalid.
SELECT org WHERE id=?; on not found return 404.
If org.Status == 'blocked': return c.JSON(200, orgResponse) immediately (idempotent, no UPDATE).
Execute UPDATE orgs SET status='blocked', updated_at=NowUTC() WHERE id=?.
On DB error: return APIError 500. Re-fetch and return c.JSON(200, updatedOrgResponse).

subtasks.title: Implement unblockOrg handler
details: func unblockOrg(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c); parse :id UUID; return 400 on invalid.
SELECT org WHERE id=?; on not found return 404.
If org.Status == 'active': return c.JSON(200, orgResponse) immediately (idempotent, no UPDATE).
Execute UPDATE orgs SET status='active', updated_at=NowUTC() WHERE id=?.
On DB error: return APIError 500. Re-fetch and return c.JSON(200, updatedOrgResponse).

checks: go test ./internal/handlers/... -count=1 -v -run 'TestDeleteOrg|TestBlockOrg|TestUnblockOrg' — all tests pass
go vet ./internal/handlers/... reports no errors
08-REQ-6, 08-REQ-7, 08-REQ-8 acceptance criteria met; idempotency confirmed in TestBlockOrg_Idempotent and TestUnblockOrg_Idempotent

task_groups.title: Implement listOrgMembers, addOrgMember, and removeOrgMember Handlers

subtasks.title: Implement listOrgMembers handler
details: func listOrgMembers(c echo.Context) error in internal/handlers/org_members.go.
Parse :id UUID; return 400 'invalid organization id' on failure.
SELECT org WHERE id=?; on not found return 404 'organization not found'.
Check IsAdmin(c); if false call isOrgMember(db, orgID, GetUserID(c)); propagate error as 500; return 403 if not member.
SELECT om.created_at, u.id, u.username, u.email, u.role FROM org_members om JOIN users u ON u.id=om.user_id WHERE om.org_id=? ORDER BY u.username ASC.
Scan into []OrgMemberResponse (non-nil empty slice); return c.JSON(200, members). On DB error: 500.

subtasks.title: Implement addOrgMember handler
details: func addOrgMember(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c).
Parse :id and :user_id via uuid.Parse; return 400 'invalid organization id' or 'invalid user id' respectively.
SELECT 1 FROM orgs WHERE id=?; on not found return 404 'organization not found'.
SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE id=?; on not found return 404 'user not found'.
INSERT INTO org_members (org_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (?,?,NowUTC()); on PRIMARY KEY conflict (idempotent) return 204.
On other DB error: return 500. On success: return c.NoContent(204).

subtasks.title: Implement removeOrgMember handler
details: func removeOrgMember(c echo.Context) error: call RequireAdmin(c).
Parse :id and :user_id; return 400 'invalid organization id' or 'invalid user id' on failure.
DELETE FROM org_members WHERE org_id=? AND user_id=?; check result.RowsAffected().
If 0 rows deleted: return APIError 404 'membership not found'.
On DB error: return APIError 500. User rows in users table are unaffected (no cascade here).
Return c.NoContent(204).

go vet ./internal/handlers/... reports no errors
08-REQ-9, 08-REQ-10, 08-REQ-11 acceptance criteria met; idempotency confirmed in TestAddMember_Idempotent

subtasks.title: Implement TestOrgLifecycle and TestOrgBlockUnblockCycle integration tests
details: TestOrgLifecycle: POST /orgs → GET /orgs/:id → PATCH /orgs/:id (name update) → GET /orgs/:id (verify new name and updated_at > created_at) → DELETE /orgs/:id (204) → GET /orgs/:id (404).
Verify during lifecycle: slug immutable across PATCH, updated_at increments, org absent after delete.
TestOrgBlockUnblockCycle: create org → GET /orgs (visible) → POST /block → GET /orgs (absent) → GET /orgs?include_blocked=true (present) → POST /unblock → GET /orgs (visible again).
Use a real in-memory SQLite DB and actual Echo server for all integration tests.

subtasks.title: Implement TestOrgMembershipLifecycle, TestOrgDeleteCascade, TestOrgMemberAccess integration tests
details: TestOrgMembershipLifecycle: create org → PUT member → GET /members (verify user appears with all fields, ordered) → DELETE member → GET /members (verify user absent).
TestOrgDeleteCascade: create org → add N members → DELETE /orgs/:id → assert org_members count=0 for org_id → assert users rows still exist.

TestOrgMemberAccess: create org → add user as member → GET /orgs/:id as member (200) → GET /orgs/:id as non-member (403) → GET /orgs/:id/members as member (200) → GET /orgs/:id/members as non-member (403).

subtasks.title: Implement TestOrgAdminEndpointsRequireAdmin, TestOrgCacheHeaders, TestOrgConditionalGet integration tests
details: TestOrgAdminEndpointsRequireAdmin: send POST /orgs, PATCH, DELETE, POST /block, POST /unblock, PUT member, DELETE member with non-admin token → all return 403.
TestOrgCacheHeaders: for each of the 10 org endpoints with valid admin auth, assert Cache-Control: no-store header present.
TestOrgConditionalGet: create org → GET (capture ETag) → update org → GET with old ETag → assert 200 (not 304, since ETag changed) → GET with new ETag → assert 304.

All 6 execution paths (08-PATH-1 through 08-PATH-6) exercised by integration tests

task_groups.title: Wiring Verification: End-to-End Integration and Stub Audit

subtasks.title: Trace all execution paths and verify no stubs remain
details: Trace 08-PATH-1 (admin creates org): POST /orgs → RequireAdmin → validateSlug → uuid.New → NowUTC → sql INSERT → JSON 201. Verify each call in production code.
Trace 08-PATH-2 (member views org): GET /orgs/:id → uuid.Parse → SELECT → IsAdmin → isOrgMember → SetETag → CheckETag → JSON 200.
Trace 08-PATH-3 (block/unblock): SELECT → status check → UPDATE → JSON 200.
Trace 08-PATH-4 (membership management): PUT → RequireAdmin → uuid.Parse × 2 → SELECT orgs → SELECT users → INSERT org_members → 204.
Trace 08-PATH-5 (full lifecycle): POST → PUT member → PATCH → GET → DELETE (cascade) → GET 404.
Trace 08-PATH-6 (listing with filter): GET → WHERE status='active' → block → GET without blocked → GET with include_blocked=true.
Search internal/handlers/*.go for panic("not implemented"), // TODO, bare return nil in non-trivial paths — zero instances allowed.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation across all handlers
details: Verify RequireAdmin(c) error is always propagated — handlers return the error, not ignore it.
Verify db.WrapError is called on all SQL errors before APIError is returned.
Verify isOrgMember error return (false, err) is checked and propagated as HTTP 500 — not silently discarded.
Verify result.RowsAffected() is checked in deleteOrg and removeOrgMember handlers.
Verify NowUTC() result is actually used in all SET updated_at= clauses (not time.Now() or zero value).
Verify uuid.Parse error causes immediate 400 return without any DB query.

subtasks.title: Run all smoke tests with real components
details: Run TS-08-SMOKE-1: POST /orgs with real auth middleware and SQLite — confirm 201, UUID v4, status='active', Cache-Control: no-store.
Run TS-08-SMOKE-2: GET /orgs/:id as member — confirm 200, ETag header, 304 on re-request with same ETag.
Run TS-08-SMOKE-3: block then unblock — confirm status transitions and list inclusion/exclusion.
Run TS-08-SMOKE-4: add → list → remove member — confirm member appears in list with all fields then disappears.
Run TS-08-SMOKE-5: full lifecycle — POST → add member → PATCH → GET → DELETE → GET 404; confirm cascade and user preservation.
Run TS-08-SMOKE-6: list with blocked filter — confirm blocked org excluded by default, included with ?include_blocked=true.
All smoke tests use real spec 01, 02, 05 components (no mocks).

subtasks.title: Cross-spec entry point verification and final full test run
details: Verify RegisterOrgHandlers is called from production server setup code (not only in tests).
Verify APIGroup() from spec 01 is used as the *echo.Group argument — CacheMiddleware(CacheNoStore) is inherited.
Verify auth middleware from spec 05 is applied at the group level — confirm all 10 endpoints return 401 without credentials.
Verify db.WrapError and db.ErrNotFound from spec 02 are imported and used (not redefined).
Run go test ./... -count=1 — complete test suite passes with zero failures.
Run go test -race ./... -count=1 — zero data race warnings.
Run go vet ./... — zero issues.
